content: A swarm of curiosity-driven ICM-powered autonomous UAVs can use Contriever's dense open-domain retrieval capabilities to ground their intrinsic exploratory behaviors in real-world semantic knowledge, turning undirected curiosity into targeted, semantically meaningful search missions. This creates a self-improving loop where the novelty rewards from ICM are weighted by the semantic relevance of discovered targets to the swarm's implicit mission, rather than just prediction error.
